description_long: This is a well-worn ball-peen hammer, featuring a robust, cylindrical metal head with a rounded peen on one end and a flat striking face on the other. The head is heavily marked with patches of rust and discoloration, indicating extensive use and exposure to the elements. The handle is solid and appears to be made of metal, showing a slightly curved, irregular form with visible dents, scratches, and areas of chipped paint, primarily in dark gray and faded red hues. The surface of the handle is rough and lacks any ergonomic grip or padding, suggesting it is an older, utilitarian design. The hammer's overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or construction sites. No visible branding or additional attachments are present on the hammer.
description: A heavily used, rusted ball-peen hammer with a solid metal handle and head, showing significant wear and chipped paint in gray and red tones.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from an angled side view, highlighting the rounded peen and flat striking face, as well as the curved, dented handle with visible rust and chipped paint.
description_view_1: This view shows the hammer from the top of the handle, emphasizing the length and curvature of the handle and the alignment of the head.
description_view_2: A side profile of the hammer, clearly displaying the cylindrical head with the ball-peen and the flat face, as well as the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: The hammer is viewed from above the head, focusing on the rounded peen and the flat striking face, with the handle receding away.
attribute_handle_type: solid metal handle, slightly curved, rough surface with visible dents, scratches, and chipped paint; no ergonomic grip or padding
attribute_head_type: ball-peen hammer head with one rounded peen and one flat striking face, cylindrical and robust, heavily worn
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: significant rust, discoloration, scratches, dents, and chipped paint throughout the handle and head
